title: KV-psi, using Linux PSI to to trim an LLM KV cache
abstract: I thought it'd be interesting to use  Linux PSI (Pressure Stall Information) for an LLM runtime to trim the KV cache. This is mainly useful imo for edge devices like the Jetson Orin super nano kit which have unified memory. I haven't benched much, but plan to do so more over time and see i
abstract_zh: 嘿，别让缓存把你憋得喘不过气来！我用Linux PSI给大模型的KV缓存来了个瘦身计划。特别是对那些内存统一的小家伙们（比如Jetson Orin超迷你板），这招可救急了。不过呢，这事儿还得慢慢来，得给它一点时间秀出真本事。
